exploration_notes: Modified GRPCServer.DeleteMFADevice in lib/auth/grpcserver.go to add MFA device deletion safety checks. The function was previously returning NotImplemented (deprecated). The implementation now: (1) authenticates the user and retrieves their MFA devices via Services.GetMFADevices, (2) obtains the cluster auth preference via GetAuthPreference, (3) classifies devices by type counting TOTP and U2F, (4) applies a switch on authPref.Spec.SecondFactor to block deletion of the last required device base
